title: Timeless and Classics Zero Unofficial Modpack [UPDATE SOON!]
body:
# This is a modpack created by an unofficial creator!
[--> go to the official mod <--](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)

![Timeless and Classics Zero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b1378e881d43188916152673c4be61342ff85.webp)
# The most immersive Minecraft FPS gaming experience

- Sophisticated shooting, maneuvering, and inspecting animations
- Well-designed gun craft system - Modify your guns, survival friendly!
- Refined models and optimization go hand in hand - LOD optimization strategies
- Compatibility - Compatible with most shaders, play with confidence!

## Features
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Unique reloading and inspection animation - every gun is different!
![Unique reloading and inspection animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0f1f7260a7fc6c04ec6e24b44e21cd42098a4ab_0.webp)

### Modify your weapon with the new attachment UI
![Modify your weapon with the new attachment UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91d5a63f52a3b3c62f2d06036d77ba5216cda5a8.png)

### Crafting in exclusive workbenches - Survival Friendly
![Crafting in exclusive workbenches - Survival Friendly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ecd4ec9d86fce5493ab9e5eeaf82a61743f864.jpeg)

### Visualization and compatibility at the same time - new scope view implementation
![Visualization and compatibility at the same time - new scope view implementation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af21838e3317f2d68bdcc0b3d612ec4e6bf0abe.png)

</details>
